summary: Forward 2-D DFT of a real Image/Field1 plane into a typed complex Spectrum (non-normalized forward transform, DC at the array origin, channels transformed independently).

inputs.name: input
inputs.doc: The real Image or Field1 spatial plane to transform.

outputs.name: spectrum
outputs.doc: The complex frequency spectrum (interleaved real/imaginary per bin).

perceptual.reason: the forward DFT is verified by the fft2->ifft2 reconstruction round trip, the constant-plane pure-DC fixture, and the known-sinusoid spectral-peak fixture, not a perceptual metric
